title: storyboard.json — scene-by-scene plan (additively extensible via schema_version)
description: v1.1. The Art Director (Iris) ADDED a per-scene `effects` array under a bumped schema_version ('1.1'). It is OPTIONAL (additive) so older artifacts and the offline stub producer — which stamps '1.0' and omits it — still validate; additionalProperties stays true so older readers never break.

effects.description: schema_version 1.1 (additive): the per-scene, VARYING techniques (distinct from the style guide's always-on global textures and from layout). Structure is fixed here; the allowed effect NAMES are grounded in the Art Director's vocabulary (value-level), refinable by the Composition Engineer without another schema bump.
